abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Memories of the Yellow Crypt
abilities.text: After an ally within 8" gains an Adaptable token during a friendly activation, this model may move it up to 3".

abilities.name: The Deep Dark Forest Where 2+2=5
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy attack, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does, it then heals an amount equal to the number of (soulstone) this crew has remaining.

actions.name: Witch Killer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model removed an Adaptable token to add a suit, this attack receives an (t).

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: Zwischenzug
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. Move the target up to 4". Allies ignore any damage dealt by this action.

triggers.name: All My Pawns
triggers.text: Enemy only. A different enemy model within range is dealt 2 damage and moved up to 4".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Prioritize
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 3 or less from your discard pile.

actions.name: Confiscated Lore
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Look at the top five cards of the opposing player's fate deck and discard any number of them, putting the rest back in any order.

triggers.name: Knight to E5
triggers.text: An ally in LoS gains an Adaptable token.
